S

setDebugMode(boolean) - Static method in class com.cirrent.networkintelligencedata.onboarding.MobileAppIntelligence
 
setOnboardingDeviceInfo(String) - Static method in class com.cirrent.networkintelligencedata.onboarding.MobileAppIntelligence
Optional method that allows you to send a Device ID to the cloud.
setOnboardingDeviceInfo(String, Map<String, String>) - Static method in class com.cirrent.networkintelligencedata.onboarding.MobileAppIntelligence
Same as MobileAppIntelligence.setOnboardingDeviceInfo(String) but this method allows you to add additional device attributes that will be sent along with the Device ID.
setOnboardingType(OnboardingType) - Static method in class com.cirrent.networkintelligencedata.onboarding.MobileAppIntelligence
Required method that allows you to set OnboardingType.
setOnboardingType(String) - Static method in class com.cirrent.networkintelligencedata.onboarding.MobileAppIntelligence
Same as MobileAppIntelligence.setOnboardingType(OnboardingType) but this method allows you to set a custom on-boarding type.
startOnboarding(int) - Static method in class com.cirrent.networkintelligencedata.onboarding.MobileAppIntelligence
Required method that tells the cloud that onboarding has been started.
startOnboarding() - Static method in class com.cirrent.networkintelligencedata.onboarding.MobileAppIntelligence
Required method that tells the cloud that onboarding has been started.
startOnboarding(OnboardingType) - Static method in class com.cirrent.networkintelligencedata.onboarding.MobileAppIntelligence
Same as MobileAppIntelligence.startOnboarding() but this method allows you to set OnboardingType.
startOnboarding(String) - Static method in class com.cirrent.networkintelligencedata.onboarding.MobileAppIntelligence
Same as MobileAppIntelligence.startOnboarding() but this method allows you to set a custom on-boarding type.
startOnboarding(int, OnboardingType) - Static method in class com.cirrent.networkintelligencedata.onboarding.MobileAppIntelligence
Same as MobileAppIntelligence.startOnboarding(int) but this method allows you to set OnboardingType.
startOnboarding(int, String) - Static method in class com.cirrent.networkintelligencedata.onboarding.MobileAppIntelligence
Same as MobileAppIntelligence.startOnboarding(int) but this method allows you to set a custom on-boarding type.
